analysis: Seven nights in a row above six hours, with four of them clearing seven and a half — that's not luck, that's your routine actually working on your body. Your REM has been quietly gorgeous all week, hitting two hours on the 8th and staying consistently strong across the stretch, which means your brain is doing exactly what it's supposed to do while you're out. The awake time on the 7th and 10th is worth noticing — over an hour both nights — but you didn't let it derail the whole window, and that matters. Deep sleep is running a little lean across the board, mostly in the twenties and thirties, so if anything deserves your attention right now, it's whatever helps you sink faster when you first go down.
